title: ficus subtrinervia var. doormaniana
intro: Ficus subtrinervia var. doormaniana, also known as the Port Jackson fig or Doorman's fig, is a variety of the Ficus subtrinervia tree native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ficus subtrinervia var. doormaniana include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
